categories.label: Yuki's Auras
categories.description: Cosmetic tail-flame colors for your Yuki companion. Pure flex, no gameplay effect.

categories.label: Power-Ups
categories.description: Consumable boosts that help with lessons and streaks.

items.name: Streak Freeze
items.effect: Protects your streak for one missed day

items.name: Hint Token
items.effect: Reveals one letter/word in a quiz question

categories.label: Adventure Gear
categories.description: Items that help on the Adventure map.

items.name: Guardian Retry Token
items.effect: Immediately retry a failed Guardian Battle

items.name: Fog Compass
items.effect: Reveals the next zone on the map early

categories.label: Mystery Chest
categories.description: Weighted random reward. The engagement centerpiece of the shop.

engagement_mechanics: Daily rotating 'Featured Deal' — one item at 20-30% off for 24 hours, shown at the top of the shop
Limited-time seasonal auras tied to real calendar events (e.g. a Dia de Muertos aura in November)
'Almost there' progress bar under any item the user can't yet afford, showing how many more coins are needed
First-purchase bonus: 20% extra coins credited the first time a user buys anything
Rarity color coding: gray=common, blue=rare, purple=epic, gold=special, matching Adventure map badge colors for visual consistency
